seoTitle: Check Your Power BI License Type: Free, Pro, or Premium
metaDescription: Not sure which Power BI license you have? Learn how to quickly check whether you're on Free, Pro, or Premium and what each tier unlocks.
intro: Knowing your Power BI license type determines which features and sharing options are available to you. This guide shows exactly where to find your license status in the Power BI interface and explains why understanding it matters for your reporting workflow.

steps.heading: Navigate the Power BI interface
steps.body: Open Power BI and go to the section of the interface where account and licensing details are displayed.

steps.heading: Check your license type
steps.body: Locate the specific setting that shows whether your account is on the Free, Pro, or Premium tier.

steps.heading: Understand the differences between license types
steps.body: Each tier unlocks different capabilities, particularly around sharing, collaboration, and data capacity, so knowing your tier helps you plan your reporting strategy.

steps.heading: Consider automation for license tracking
steps.body: For organizations managing multiple users, automating license checks via the Power BI API can help ensure the whole team has the right access.

steps.heading: Apply this knowledge to your workflow
steps.body: Once you know your license type, you can better plan which features to rely on and when an upgrade might be worth considering.

faq.question: What's the difference between Power BI Free and Pro?
faq.answer: Pro unlocks additional sharing and collaboration features that aren't available on the Free tier, which is more limited for individual use.

faq.question: How do I know if my organization has Power BI Premium?
faq.answer: Checking your license type in the Power BI interface will show whether Premium capacity is applied to your account or workspace.

faq.question: Can I upgrade my Power BI license after checking my current type?
faq.answer: Yes, once you know your current tier, you can decide whether upgrading makes sense based on the features you need.

faq.question: Does my license type affect how I share reports with others?
faq.answer: Yes, sharing capabilities differ significantly between Free, Pro, and Premium, making it important to understand your tier before distributing reports.
